message:
feat(guard): add python3 availability check before hook installation

Both the Claude Code hook and git pre-commit hook are Python 3 scripts,
but installations could silently fail if python3 was not in PATH.

Changes:
- Add python3 availability check at the start of installGuard()
- Add python3 availability check at the start of installGitHook()
- Display a warning (not error) if python3 is not found, allowing
  the user to install Python before using the hooks
- Only check in non-silent mode to avoid noise during auto-install
- Uses async exec with promisify to check "python3 --version"

The warning approach is intentional: the hook files are still written
(they're just Python scripts) and will work once Python is installed.
This avoids blocking users who plan to install Python later.
